final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end Chinese domestic GP/LP roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 16:9 presentation cover layout with title area, presenter name, and event context clearly structured
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative atmosphere fitting a top-tier 路演 — exact light and mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that balances tech-forward and Chinese institutional finance sensibility — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (prominent, primary), "奥特曼" (presenter name), and roadshow/launch context copy in Chinese as appropriate for a 国内融资路演 cover
Constraints: must preserve 国内路演 GP/LP deck conventions — clean hierarchy, institutional credibility, no overly casual or Western startup aesthetic
Avoid:
